_description: Residual cascade (symmetric, end-to-end) — Stage 0 U-Net [32,64,128,256] + Stage 1 ResUNet [32,64,128,256], trained jointly. Stage 1 features now unified to 4 levels to match Stage 0. Controls for the detach variant and mirrors the naive-cascade detach/e2e pair, so the detach-vs-e2e axis is directly comparable across naive and residual modes.
